title: The Best Chili
description: A hearty beef chili with kidney beans, tomatoes, bell pepper, jalapeño, and a splash of beer.

items: 2½ tablespoons chili powder, divided (or to taste)
1 green bell pepper, seeded and diced

instructions: Combine ground beef and 1½ tablespoons chili powder.
In a large pot, brown ground beef, onion, jalapeño, and garlic. Drain any fat.
Add in remaining ingredients and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered 45-60 minutes or until chili has reached desired thickness.
Top with cheddar cheese, green onions, cilantro, or other favorite toppings.
